item.description:

item.title: TheIrishField: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 23min WATCH: Kap Vert wins Scottish National, having been sold by Kim Roque's owner at
item.description: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 23min WATCH: Kap Vert wins Scottish National, having been sold by Kim Roque's owner at the end of last season. De theirishfield.ie 1 211
